text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
If I want to increase my luck in health, I need to
put this here... and here too...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Phew! Now we're in business! Thanks to these salt
mounds, everyone will be able to train safely! ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Oh no! The salt mounds collapsed! Where's this
wind coming from?!

text_block_list.name: Ritto Dorm Resident
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Why does it feel like I'm stepping on sand?!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Ack! I'll clean it up right now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey ends up worn out dealing with the
aftermath of the windswept salt incident...
